---
title: "Cassia Post"
subtitle: "Data Scientist"
# `profile.jpg` photo by Jan Tinneberg on https://unsplash.com
image: profile.jpg
image-alt: "Photo cassia post"
about: # https://quarto.org/docs/websites/website-about.html
  template: trestles
  links:
    - icon: github
      text: Github
      href: https://github.com
    - icon: linkedin
      text: LinkedIn
      href: https://www.linkedin.com/in/cassia-post-a4602b362/
---

A little bit about me and my life. 

## Education

Reed College, Portland \| Oregon \| Sept 2003 - Current

## Experience

Workplace \| Job title \| April 20XX - present
